auth.loginSubtitle: Use one login flow for all five roles.
auth.heroDescription: This Phase 01 shell connects the React frontend to the Laravel API, keeps auth state in Zustand, and routes each user to the correct dashboard.
auth.networkError: The frontend cannot reach the backend API. Restart the frontend and verify the API URL.
auth.serverError: The login request failed on the server.
auth.validation: Enter a valid email and password.
auth.resetSubtitle: Enter your email to request a password reset link.

secure.title: Secure backend auth
secure.description: Sanctum-backed token flow with API-only routes.

roles.title: Role-aware routing
roles.description: Each role is redirected to its own dashboard namespace.

speed.title: Phase 01 ready
speed.description: The foundation is aligned with the docs and ready for feature work.

dashboard.foundationDescription: The shell is ready for the remaining business modules.
dashboard.foundationCopy: Auth, guards, shared UI, theme persistence, and dashboard metrics are now wired together across the production frontend.
dashboard.nextSteps: Next work should fill the role pages, services, and module-specific flows from the creation checklist.
